Data.Comment: 0: BCM cannot receive message from METER 1: can receive message from METER

Data.Comment: 0: BCM cannot receive message from ABS 1: can receive message from ABS

Data.Comment: 0: BCM cannot receive message from CLIM 1: can receive message from CLIM

Data.Name: CAN CIRC 8
Data.Comment: 0: BCM cannot receive message from AIRBAG 1: can receive message from AIRBAG

BCM CLK Failure - internal oscillator error
FRONT_WIPER_FAILURE - Front Wiper block protection activated
I_EXT_TEMP - external Temperature analog input failure
IO_DATA_IMMOBILIZER - transponder antenna serial line failure
O_BAT_LIGHT_TEMPO - Room Lamp Supply output failure
O_DOOR_UNLOCK - Door Unlock actuator output problem
O_FR_HS_WIPER - Front High Speed Wiper output error
O_FR_LS_WIPER - Front Low Speed Wiper output error
O_GROUND_LIGHT_TEMPO - Room Lamp Control output failure
O_HIGH_BEAM - High Beam Lamp output error
O_LOW_BEAM - Low Beam Lamp output error
RR_WIPER_FAILURE - Rear Wiper block protection activated
No possible classification about the type of fault

Anomalie éléctronique interne / internal electronic anomaly (Dh)

Circuit ouvert ou court-circuit à la masse (14h)
